item.title: LETTER | Losing count of mounting fatalities on our motorways
item.description: Enough talk, time for authorities to act.
item.dc:creator: JD Lovrenciear

item.title: LETTER | Bear trap: Rohingya crisis without easy exit for anyone
item.description: It seems like all roads lead to a dead end.
item.dc:creator: Francesca Lee

item.title: LETTER | Calcium carbide, the silent poison in our fruits
item.description: Despite decades of warning, govt yet to ban its use on fruits.
item.dc:creator: Mohideen Abdul Kader

item.title: LETTER | Hardworking M'sians deserve decent wages
item.description: It's alarming that over 70pct of workers earn RM5k or less.
item.dc:creator: Ben Fong Kok Seng

item.title: LETTER | Why your innovative 'culture hack' won’t save you
item.description: Innovation succeeds through systems, not slogans, workshops, or office perks.
item.dc:creator: Ahmad Ibrahim

item.title: LETTER | Beyond race and religion: The leadership Malaysia needs
item.description: We need a leader who will put country first, transcend self-interest.
item.dc:creator: Ranjit Singh Malhi

item.title: LETTER | When emotion replaces evidence
item.description: Netizens' response to crime reflects societal problems, lack of awareness.
item.dc:creator: Haezreena Begum Abdul Hamid

item.title: LETTER | Public healthcare sustainability: Strengthening revenue, retaining talent
item.description: This is an open letter to PM, health minister to optimise resources.
item.dc:creator: Jeffrey Ng

item.title: LETTER | No governance with DAP in Johor: Why the hypocrisy!
item.description: While DAP deludes itself, Umno knows how to adapt.
item.dc:creator: K Veeriah

item.title: LETTER | A fowl situation in our hospitals
item.description: Viral video of pigeons in a ward exposes maintenance failures, hygiene concerns.
item.dc:creator: JD Lovrenciear

item.title: LETTER | Reject hate, uphold justice: Standing with Rohingya
item.description: Hate campaign against the community clear manifestation of xenophobia.
item.dc:creator: ACSC/APF

item.title: LETTER | Escalating hate against Rohingya in M'sia shameful
item.description: The measure of a nation is how it treats the vulnerable.
item.dc:creator: Beyond Borders, et al

item.title: LETTER | The story of SJKT Ladang Sedenak, a long overdue victory
item.description: The Kulai school has relied on well and spring water for 67 years.
item.dc:creator: M Vivekananthan

item.title: LETTER | Provide equal access to development funds for all constituencies
item.description: There shouldn't be discrimination based on party membership or political allegiance.
item.dc:creator: Aliran

item.title: LETTER | Clean polls: No one should be treated like dirt
item.description: Party just as responsible as its supporters if they display hate.
item.dc:creator: Tajuddin Mohd Rasdi

item.title: LETTER | MTUC - nobody seems to miss them?
item.description: Glory days are over; it has long been a tame union.
item.dc:creator: S Arutchelvan

item.title: LETTER | Leverage TikTok's power to drive small business growth
item.description: Platform a vital tool to expand market reach, thrive in modern digital economy.
item.dc:creator: M Vivekananthan

item.title: LETTER | Don’t deny T20 of subsidies, they're struggling too
item.description: High cost of living, economic slowdown hitting them hard.
item.dc:creator: Loga Bala Mohan

item.title: LETTER | Gen Z wants flexibility, not the office grind
item.description: Traditional careers are giving way to online income models.
item.dc:creator: M Vivekananthan

item.title: LETTER | Unite against latest US hegemony push
item.description: Trump aims to pressure more countries into recognising Israel.
item.dc:creator: Saifuddin Abdullah

item.title: LETTER | Too much hate, too little love in media reports
item.description: Some media resort to yellow journalism for profit.
item.dc:creator: YS Chan

item.title: LETTER | Selangor PPR rental hike: Evidence is there
item.description: Stop making the poor pay for a crisis they did not create.
item.dc:creator: PSM

item.title: LETTER | Why M'sia still fails people with disabilities
item.description: The Federal Constitution itself does not explicitly prohibit discrimination based on disability.
item.dc:creator: Cheng Xin Yee

item.title: LETTER | KTMB remains committed to enhancing service for passengers
item.description: We acknowledge feedback and will review and improve.
item.dc:creator: KTMB

item.title: LETTER | When promises go off the rails
item.description: Transport minister needs to execute a comprehensive overhaul of KTMB.
item.dc:creator: Concerned Citizen

item.title: LETTER | Silent struggle: Don't brush off sexual harassment against men
item.description: Empathy should be the first response for any victim who comes forward.
item.dc:creator: Chan Quin Er

item.title: LETTER | A king is a king, Pua
item.description: It's a mistake to think a constitutional monarch's role is confined to the Constitution alone.
item.dc:creator: Hafiz Hassan

item.title: LETTER | Education, identity, and the Malaysian compromise
item.description: The arguments that UEC undermines national unity become untenable in the modern context.
item.dc:creator: Afdzal Zainal Alam

item.title: LETTER | Why govt should not appeal nicotine ruling and raise tobacco tax instead
item.description: Simply raising excise duties is a far simpler solution to improve public health.
item.dc:creator: Azrul Mohd Khalib

item.title: LETTER | Silent health crisis hidden by the scales
item.description: Lack of exercise, poor lifestyle choices affecting people's muscle mass.
item.dc:creator: Nurdiana Zainol Abidin
